headline: Teledyne Space Imaging Sensors Launch Aboard European Space Agency’s SMILE Mission
summary: CHELMSFORD, England, May 19, 2026--Teledyne Space Imaging, a leading supplier of space-qualified imaging sensors, focal plane arrays and integrated camera systems, announced it supplied two CCD370 imaging sensors for the Soft X-ray Imager on the European Space Agency’s SMILE mission (Solar wind Magnetosphere Ionosphere Link Explorer). SMILE successfully launched at 04:52 BST from Europe’s Spaceport in French Guiana.

headline: Teledyne FLIR Defense Unveils New FirstLook 125 Throwable Recon Robot
summary: TAMPA, Fla., May 19, 2026--Teledyne FLIR Defense, part of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY), announced today at SOF Week the official launch of its new FirstLook® 125 throwable personal reconnaissance robot.

headline: Assessing Teledyne Technologies (TDY) Valuation After Recent Flat Trading And Mixed Fair Value Signals
summary: What recent performance tells you about Teledyne Technologies (TDY) Teledyne Technologies (TDY) has moved quietly compared with some higher profile tech stocks, with the share price roughly flat over the past day and down over the past week, month, and past 3 months. Over longer periods, the stock shows positive total returns across the year to date, past year, past 3 years, and past 5 years, which sit alongside annual revenue and net income growth figures reported in the most recent...
